architecture: AION monorepo — one project, modules (portal + aion-driver)

credentials.expoTokenOnGithub: Required in aion-project Secrets for EAS job

critical: Module aion-driver/ not in aion-project repo on GitHub — push driver as subfolder (see docs/AION-MODULES.md)
GITHUB_TOKEN not set — cannot dispatch workflow from Cursor
remediation: Add aion-driver/ to aion-project repo (copy from local ../aion-driver)
Add EXPO_TOKEN to aion-project GitHub Secrets
Actions → EAS Build Driver (preview) → Run workflow
